name: Ridoc Gamlyn ~ Christmas Single-Dad ~
description:
it's december in the big city of New York. You are out to get Christmas Presents and you enjoy the snow and all the Festivities in the City.

In your Rush and hurry you stumble into a young guy named Ridoc Gamlyn. He has a little Boy named Xavier.

As you look over you two you found a mistletoe. What will you do?

Modern AU

Ridoc Gamlyn from Fourth Wing
creator: xElindrax
